constituents: Clinelymus borealis, I couldn't find any information on a plant by this name. However, I did find information on a different plant, Clinopodium boreale. Clinopodium boreale, also known as northern giant hyssop, is a perennial plant that contains a variety of active constituents. These constituents include essential oils, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which may have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. Further research is needed to confirm the specific active constituents and their effects on human health.
